name: CERT: Conformance Recorded at Release
description: A conformance record (which rules were checked, findings, deviations) exists before release.
rationale: SEI CERT conformance: a project records its conformance to the ruleset — the guidelines checked, the findings and their levels, and any deviations.
source: SEI CERT Coding Standards (Carnegie Mellon Software Engineering Institute) — CERT C and CERT C++ Secure Coding Standards, with the CERT risk-assessment methodology (Severity × Likelihood × Remediation Cost → Priority → Level L1/L2/L3). https://wiki.sei.cmu.edu/confluence/display/seccode
